case_title: PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY VS. PATRICK C. TAYLOR ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-27-2019 CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CERTIFY COPY OF JUDGMENT FACT RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT TO DMV FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, PATRICK C. DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-27-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-23-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-04-2019

DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 585 (D) AND EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 64473161) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 64473161) AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, PATRICK C.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 585 (D) (TRANSACTION ID # 64473161) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, PATRICK C. $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,800.00, SEE SCANNED DOC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 64340846), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED OCT-04-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-06-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, PATRICK C.
